name: wear
checklist: Spawn on the beach with a full 8/8 inventory: flashlight, bandage, Padded Jacket, Canvas Backpack, beans, water, cloth, wood.
Open Tab — an EQUIPMENT section shows 'body: —' and 'back: —'; the jacket and backpack rows show a WEAR button.
WEAR the Padded Jacket — it moves to 'body:' and its inventory slot frees up.
WEAR the Canvas Backpack — it moves to 'back:' and a PACK section with 4 empty rows (slots 9-12) appears.
Drop a stack, pick it back up after filling slots — items flow into PACK rows; USE and DROP work from PACK rows (equip/hotbar keys 1-8 never select them).
Put an item in a PACK row, then REMOVE the backpack — rejected with the notice 'empty your pack first'; nothing is lost.
Empty the PACK rows but keep hotbar slots 1-8 full, then REMOVE the backpack — rejected with 'no room in inventory'; the pack stays worn (never destroyed).
Free one hotbar slot and REMOVE the backpack — it returns to the inventory and the PACK section disappears.
With the jacket worn, stand exposed at night (or in rain): temperature falls noticeably slower than with it removed (0.65 insulation).
Select the jacket on the hotbar and press F — F-key USE also wears it (parity with the WEAR button).
Die on a fullLoot server — the corpse contains the worn jacket and backpack; the fresh spawn has 8 slots and empty EQUIPMENT.
Wear both, disconnect, rejoin — EQUIPMENT and the 12-slot inventory are restored from the save.
